title: Practice Quiz PQ2 and quiz Q2 now available on accepi
content:
Please note that the practice quiz PQ2 is open answer (like a regular accepi assignment), but the quiz Q2 is multiple choice (just like a typical Canvas quiz). You have one attempt for Q2. The data for the quiz is posted on Canvas on Week 9 page and it's called data_q2.xls (just in case).

 

Both the practice quiz and the quiz are available until Monday, Oct 20 at midnight. Please let me know if you have questions.
contentText:
